summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Energy AI Trading Platform with Iron Condor, Butterfly strategies and options backtesting. All major features working correctly.

minor_issues.issue: Returns 400 when email already exists (expected behavior)

passed_tests: Iron Condor API creates 4-leg strategy (2 puts, 2 calls)
Butterfly API creates 3-leg strategy with correct quantities [1, -2, 1]
Options backtest API returns win rate and best_conditions analysis
Options tab shows all 4 strategy buttons (straddle, strangle, iron condor, butterfly)
Mobile responsive design - site loads and navigation works on 390x844 viewport
Dashboard loads with all components (regime badge, account summary, price chart, positions, trades)
WebSocket connection works - shows LIVE status
Multi-asset selection (CL, BZ, NG) works correctly
Authentication system working with admin credentials
All options strategy creation buttons clickable and functional
Options backtesting redirects to backtest tab correctly
Backend API success rate: 98.6% (73/74 tests passed)
